en_title: Obsession Won’t Be Coming to Digital This Week — And That’s a Good Thing
cn_title: 低成本恐怖片《Obsession》延期上线数字平台，票房持续走高
subtitle: 票房逆跌，延期有理
opus_summary: 低成本恐怖片《Obsession》原定6月2日上线数字平台，但NBCU决定延长院线放映时间。该片制作成本仅75万美元（约合人民币537万元），北美首周末票房超1720万美元（约合人民币1.23亿元），全球累计超1.48亿美元（约合人民币10.6亿元）。影片由26岁油管主Curry Barker执导，社交媒体上的惊悚片段引发热议。同期《后室》也表现亮眼，而《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》票房相对疲软。

paragraphs.en: Obsession was initially slated to release on PVOD platforms this week, on June 2. However, NBCU recently removed the digital release from its schedule, instead opting to extend the low-budget horror darling’s time in theaters.
paragraphs.cn: 《Obsession》原定于本周（6月2日）上线付费视频点播（PVOD）平台。然而，NBCU近日将该片的数字发行从日程中移除，转而延长这部低成本恐怖宠儿的院线放映时间。

paragraphs.en: The digital delay makes complete sense when you look at the numbers. The film was infamously produced on a budget of just $750,000 . Over its opening weekend in North America, it grossed over $17.2 million , breaking even with relative ease.
paragraphs.cn: 看看票房数字，数字版延期就完全说得通了。该片制作成本仅为75万美元（约合人民币537万元），北美首周末票房便超过1720万美元（约合人民币1.23亿元），轻松回本。

paragraphs.en: What’s truly impressive, however, is how the film has continued to increase its box office performance each weekend since its release. Just this past weekend, the film at the domestic box office, a 10% increase over the previous weekend, placing it in the top 10 highest-grossing movies in the U.S. this year. It currently stands at over $148 million worldwide.
paragraphs.cn: 真正令人印象深刻的是，该片自上映以来每个周末的票房都在持续增长。就在上周末，其北美票房较前一周上涨10%，跻身今年美国票房前十。目前全球累计票房已超过1.48亿美元（约合人民币10.6亿元）。

paragraphs.en: Obsession actually premiered at the Toronto International Film Festival last September. The monkey’s paw film continued to pick up buzz ahead of its broader theatrical release with harrowing clips that quickly made the rounds on social media. Aside from the amount of flowers being handed to the film’s director, 26-year-old YouTuber and comedian Curry Barker, Obsession has been a significant breakout moment for its two starring leads, Inde Navarrette and Michael Johnston.
paragraphs.cn: 《Obsession》实际上早在去年9月的多伦多国际电影节上就已首映。这部「猴爪」式恐怖片在全面公映前，凭借社交媒体上疯传的惊悚片段持续积累热度。除了导演——26岁的油管主兼喜剧演员Curry Barker收获大量赞誉外，该片也是两位主演Inde Navarrette和Michael Johnston的重要突破之作。

paragraphs.en: It’s also not the only horror movie making waves at the box office right now. Kane Parsons’ Backrooms , inspired by a legacy of creepy pastas, just achieved distributor A24’s .
paragraphs.cn: 《Obsession》并非当下唯一在票房上掀起波澜的恐怖片。Kane Parsons执导的《后室》——灵感源自经典的都市传说——刚刚创下了发行方A24的票房纪录。

paragraphs.en: These accomplishments are all the more significant when compared to the rather weak box office performance of a recent big-budget franchise release, Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu . As such, the takeaway here is not just that more people are going to the theaters, but that people are going to the theaters for a new generation of film-making. Backrooms, for example, garnered an audience of predominantly people under age 35, with the majority between 18 and 25.
paragraphs.cn: 与近期大制作系列电影《星球大战：曼达洛人与古古》相对疲软的票房表现相比，这些成就更显突出。因此，关键不在于更多人走进影院，而在于人们是为新一代电影制作走进影院。例如，《后室》的观众以35岁以下人群为主，其中大部分在18至25岁之间。

paragraphs.en: What lesson will studios take from these success stories? Sure, horror is definitely a trendy genre at the moment, but these also happen to be films from are two very young directors that are specifically resonating with younger audiences. Instead of trying to replicate the specific appeal of Obsession or Backrooms, we can only hope studios are willing to take more bold risks by investing in both fresh concepts and young creators.
paragraphs.cn: 制片厂会从这些成功案例中吸取什么教训？诚然，恐怖片是当下的热门类型，但这两部电影恰好出自两位非常年轻的导演之手，并且精准地引发了年轻观众的共鸣。我们只能希望制片厂不要试图复制《Obsession》或《后室》的特定吸引力，而是愿意承担更大风险，投资于新鲜概念和年轻创作者。

paragraphs.en: NBCU has not reported a specific digital release date to replace the June 2 plan. Some reports are indicating the movie will now be subject to a 45-day theatrical window, which would put the film’s digital release somewhere around June 30. On the streaming side, the movie will most likely be coming to Peacock later this year.
paragraphs.cn: NBCU尚未公布替代6月2日计划的具体数字发行日期。有报道称，该片现在将执行45天的院线窗口期，这意味着数字版发行时间大约在6月30日左右。流媒体方面，该片很可能于今年晚些时候上线Peacock。

paragraphs.en: Amazon has also quietly listed a 4K edition of Obsession with a release date of July 14. While details are slim (there’s not even an image yet), this may include an “Unrated version" that has been rumored to be a part of the eventual digital release.
paragraphs.cn: 亚马逊还悄然上架了《Obsession》的4K版本，发行日期为7月14日。虽然细节很少（甚至连图片都没有），但这可能包含传闻中最终数字版将推出的「未分级版本」。

paragraphs.en: Blythe (she/her) is an Audience Development Coordinator at IGN who, when she isn't following streaming news, spends way too much time in character customization screens and tracking down collectibles.
paragraphs.cn: Blythe（她/她）是IGN的受众发展协调员，在不追踪流媒体新闻时，她会花大量时间在角色自定义界面和寻找收藏品上。
